name: Contactless Activity and Localization
summary: Joint activity and zone-localization CSI amplitude dataset collected in a room divided into a three-by-three spatial grid.

hardware.platform: Two USRP X300/X310 radios with VERT2450 antennas

settings.scenario: Empty, leaning, sitting, standing, and walking with zone labels in a 3×3 grid

standardization.notes: Preserve both activity and spatial-zone labels for joint and single-task protocols.
